name: Alinco Incorporated
summary: Alinco Incorporated develops, manufactures, and sells scaffolding equipment in Japan and internationally. The company develops, manufactures, and sells do-it-yourself products, aluminum molds, home appliances, and radio communication equipment; and sells fitness equipment. It is also involved in the rental of construction scaffolding, Octo-system, and other temporary equipment. The company was formerly known as Inoue Iron Works Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Alinco Incorporated in March 1983. The company was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
